records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, these stupid C.O.s...! They just keep coming...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, these stupid C.O.s...! They just keep coming...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, these stupid C.O.s...! They just keep coming...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kid! How much longer for that Telescope or whatever?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kid! How much longer for that Telescope or whatever?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kid! How much longer for that Telescope or whatever?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, someone's gonna end up in a body bag...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, someone's gonna end up in a body bag...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, someone's gonna end up in a body bag...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, I think I've finally got a handle on it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, I think I've finally got a handle on it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, I think I've finally got a handle on it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dr. Macy said the Telescope wasn't originally designed as a weapon, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dr. Macy said the Telescope wasn't originally designed as a weapon, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dr. Macy said the Telescope wasn't originally designed as a weapon, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone like me who's always used the Zoom Lens, this actually feels way more stable!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone like me who's always used the Zoom Lens, this actually feels way more stable!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone like me who's always used the Zoom Lens, this actually feels way more stable!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This might really work...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This might really work...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This might really work...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, listen up...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, listen up...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, listen up...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At full power, this Telescope should be able to knock that Hollow God out of the sky!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At full power, this Telescope should be able to knock that Hollow God out of the sky!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At full power, this Telescope should be able to knock that Hollow God out of the sky!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Are you serious?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Are you serious?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Are you serious?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I won't be able to hold it down for long! Maybe three seconds... tops!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I won't be able to hold it down for long! Maybe three seconds... tops!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I won't be able to hold it down for long! Maybe three seconds... tops!

records.m_Talk_ENG: After that, I'll need time to swap out the overheated power source!
records.m_Talk_DEU: After that, I'll need time to swap out the overheated power source!
records.m_Talk_FRA: After that, I'll need time to swap out the overheated power source!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only three seconds...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only three seconds...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only three seconds...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kid, you're killing me here! Can't you pad it out to five?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kid, you're killing me here! Can't you pad it out to five?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kid, you're killing me here! Can't you pad it out to five?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, pal! What good's haggling gonna do?! Quit whining!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, pal! What good's haggling gonna do?! Quit whining!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, pal! What good's haggling gonna do?! Quit whining!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without the kid, we wouldn't even have a way to bring down that damn Category 6 C.O. in the first place!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without the kid, we wouldn't even have a way to bring down that damn Category 6 C.O. in the first place!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without the kid, we wouldn't even have a way to bring down that damn Category 6 C.O. in the first place!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I like you, maid girl. You've got fire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I like you, maid girl. You've got fire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I like you, maid girl. You've got fire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, I'm not a maid!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, I'm not a maid!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, I'm not a maid!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crashing the body of a Hollow God to earth and halting its rampage is important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crashing the body of a Hollow God to earth and halting its rampage is important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crashing the body of a Hollow God to earth and halting its rampage is important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But a Hollow God is an immortal being. Offering peace to that hideous being is an even greater duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But a Hollow God is an immortal being. Offering peace to that hideous being is an even greater duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But a Hollow God is an immortal being. Offering peace to that hideous being is an even greater duty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that duty falls only to you, who wields the Godslayer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that duty falls only to you, who wields the Godslayer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that duty falls only to you, who wields the Godslayer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When F959licette makes the Hollow God fall, everyone else should hold it down...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When F959licette makes the Hollow God fall, everyone else should hold it down...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When F959licette makes the Hollow God fall, everyone else should hold it down...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I should go in for the kill by destroying the heart, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I should go in for the kill by destroying the heart, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I should go in for the kill by destroying the heart, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's do this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's do this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's do this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might not get another shot at this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might not get another shot at this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might not get another shot at this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, the time is just right. We only get one chance...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, the time is just right. We only get one chance...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, the time is just right. We only get one chance...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Vector conversion at max! Gravity gun ready...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Vector conversion at max! Gravity gun ready...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vector conversion at max! Gravity gun ready...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Firing...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Firing...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Firing...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really dropped it?! That's some insane firepower...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really dropped it?! That's some insane firepower...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really dropped it?! That's some insane firepower...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no greater sin on the battlefield than letting your guard down, and chances like this never come twice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no greater sin on the battlefield than letting your guard down, and chances like this never come twice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no greater sin on the battlefield than letting your guard down, and chances like this never come twice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Destroy the Hollow God's body while it's down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Destroy the Hollow God's body while it's down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Destroy the Hollow God's body while it's down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I know already...! Black armor...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I know already...! Black armor...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I know already...! Black armor...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pin down the right wing. You blow off the other side...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pin down the right wing. You blow off the other side...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pin down the right wing. You blow off the other side...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Its legs and wings are down. Now's our chance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Its legs and wings are down. Now's our chance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Its legs and wings are down. Now's our chance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go, Yoo Mina...!! We've got your back from here...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go, Yoo Mina...!! We've got your back from here...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go, Yoo Mina...!! We've got your back from here...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must finish this before it regenerates again...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must finish this before it regenerates again...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must finish this before it regenerates again...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Laika!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Laika!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Laika!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with this...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with this...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with this...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Wolvesbane - Legacy Mode activated.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Wolvesbane - Legacy Mode activated.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Wolvesbane - Legacy Mode activated.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Tactical update - Valkyrie melee response focus blade.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Tactical update - Valkyrie melee response focus blade.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Tactical update - Valkyrie melee response focus blade.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: This ends now...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This ends now...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This ends now...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take that...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take that...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take that...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unbelievable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Unbelievable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Unbelievable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe humans actually brought down a Deus Ex Machina...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe humans actually brought down a Deus Ex Machina...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe humans actually brought down a Deus Ex Machina...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deus Ex Machina...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deus Ex Machina...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deus Ex Machina...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A Hollow God that meant to bring about the end of this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. A Hollow God that meant to bring about the end of this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. A Hollow God that meant to bring about the end of this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those outsiders may be far stronger than I expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those outsiders may be far stronger than I expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those outsiders may be far stronger than I expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A god meant to end the world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A god meant to end the world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A god meant to end the world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... now that the false god is defeated, is everything over...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... now that the false god is defeated, is everything over...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... now that the false god is defeated, is everything over...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'm afraid it's not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'm afraid it's not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'm afraid it's not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once a cup is broken, it can never be made whole again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once a cup is broken, it can never be made whole again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once a cup is broken, it can never be made whole again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Likewise, a world that has reached its breaking point won't just recover.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Likewise, a world that has reached its breaking point won't just recover.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Likewise, a world that has reached its breaking point won't just recover.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That woman, my future self, said we could turn the world back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That woman, my future self, said we could turn the world back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That woman, my future self, said we could turn the world back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I don't know either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I don't know either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I don't know either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I thought you knew everything, but even you have limits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I thought you knew everything, but even you have limits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I thought you knew everything, but even you have limits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, of course I do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, of course I do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, of course I do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way I could know every truth about this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way I could know every truth about this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way I could know every truth about this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Abberline...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Abberline...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Abberline...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you going? That direction is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going? That direction is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going? That direction is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, I need to fulfill the role given to me in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, I need to fulfill the role given to me in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, I need to fulfill the role given to me in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solving mysteries is my job, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solving mysteries is my job, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solving mysteries is my job, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... Manipulating the Qliphoth Factor without Droma really takes a toll.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... Manipulating the Qliphoth Factor without Droma really takes a toll.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... Manipulating the Qliphoth Factor without Droma really takes a toll.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I probably have about four or five memory pulls left in me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I probably have about four or five memory pulls left in me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I probably have about four or five memory pulls left in me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was amazing...! You really took down a Category 6 C.O...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was amazing...! You really took down a Category 6 C.O...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was amazing...! You really took down a Category 6 C.O...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. That was some top-notch support. You should be proud!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. That was some top-notch support. You should be proud!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. That was some top-notch support. You should be proud!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you two! Why are you acting like it's over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you two! Why are you acting like it's over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you two! Why are you acting like it's over?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay sharp. There's no way it ends this easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay sharp. There's no way it ends this easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay sharp. There's no way it ends this easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive... Taking down a false god so easily...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive... Taking down a false god so easily...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive... Taking down a false god so easily...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've definitely grown, Wolf. Much more than last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've definitely grown, Wolf. Much more than last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've definitely grown, Wolf. Much more than last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or perhaps it's just that you're fully recovered now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or perhaps it's just that you're fully recovered now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or perhaps it's just that you're fully recovered now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at that! We took down the Hollow God...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at that! We took down the Hollow God...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at that! We took down the Hollow God...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what else you've got planned, but none of it matters anymore...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what else you've got planned, but none of it matters anymore...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what else you've got planned, but none of it matters anymore...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So just give up and hand over Noelle...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So just give up and hand over Noelle...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So just give up and hand over Noelle...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that name...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that name...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that name...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on, Mina!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on, Mina!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on, Mina!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying that girl next to Swan is Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying that girl next to Swan is Noelle...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying that girl next to Swan is Noelle...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure it's really her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure it's really her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure it's really her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? What are you suddenly saying...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? What are you suddenly saying...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? What are you suddenly saying...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Isn't it obvious that she's
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Isn't it obvious that she's
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Isn't it obvious that she's
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Mina...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Mina...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Mina...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're experiencing the aftereffects of <color=#ffd34c>information erasure</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're experiencing the aftereffects of <color=#ffd34c>information erasure</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're experiencing the aftereffects of <color=#ffd34c>information erasure</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F959licette! But it can't be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: F959licette! But it can't be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: F959licette! But it can't be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Sudden chain dimensional rifts...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Sudden chain dimensional rifts...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Sudden chain dimensional rifts...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We took down the Hollow God... So why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We took down the Hollow God... So why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We took down the Hollow God... So why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously, Yoo Mina. Don't tell me you thought that was the end?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously, Yoo Mina. Don't tell me you thought that was the end?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously, Yoo Mina. Don't tell me you thought that was the end?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One of the defining traits of the Category 6 C.O. Hollow God is its ability to trigger chain dimensional rifts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One of the defining traits of the Category 6 C.O. Hollow God is its ability to trigger chain dimensional rifts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One of the defining traits of the Category 6 C.O. Hollow God is its ability to trigger chain dimensional rifts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't respond quickly enough, it'll start pulling in other Category 6 C.O.s drifting through the imaginary dimension.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't respond quickly enough, it'll start pulling in other Category 6 C.O.s drifting through the imaginary dimension.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't respond quickly enough, it'll start pulling in other Category 6 C.O.s drifting through the imaginary dimension.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait...! The Telescope's picking up the Divinity signals...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait...! The Telescope's picking up the Divinity signals...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait...! The Telescope's picking up the Divinity signals...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: One... two... three...?! Multiple readings...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: One... two... three...?! Multiple readings...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: One... two... three...?! Multiple readings...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way, all of these...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way, all of these...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way, all of these...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, this isn't looking good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, this isn't looking good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, this isn't looking good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We nearly died just taking down one...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We nearly died just taking down one...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We nearly died just taking down one...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each Category 6 C.O. that's drawn in will summon another Category 6 C.O...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each Category 6 C.O. that's drawn in will summon another Category 6 C.O...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each Category 6 C.O. that's drawn in will summon another Category 6 C.O...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, the world collapses under the pressure of the Corruption rays emitted by them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, the world collapses under the pressure of the Corruption rays emitted by them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, the world collapses under the pressure of the Corruption rays emitted by them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ironically, this is both the world's final defense mechanism...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ironically, this is both the world's final defense mechanism...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ironically, this is both the world's final defense mechanism...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And at the same time, it's the very process by which most worlds meet their end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And at the same time, it's the very process by which most worlds meet their end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And at the same time, it's the very process by which most worlds meet their end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ours was no different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ours was no different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ours was no different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a scriptwriter, I must say this is quite the exciting moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a scriptwriter, I must say this is quite the exciting moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a scriptwriter, I must say this is quite the exciting moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see if you can overturn a script that already has its ending written.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see if you can overturn a script that already has its ending written.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see if you can overturn a script that already has its ending written.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, these stupid C.O.s...! They just keep coming...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, these stupid C.O.s...! They just keep coming...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, these stupid C.O.s...! They just keep coming...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kid! How much longer for that Telescope or whatever?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kid! How much longer for that Telescope or whatever?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kid! How much longer for that Telescope or whatever?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, someone's gonna end up in a body bag...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, someone's gonna end up in a body bag...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, someone's gonna end up in a body bag...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, I think I've finally got a handle on it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, I think I've finally got a handle on it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, I think I've finally got a handle on it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dr. Macy said the Telescope wasn't originally designed as a weapon, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dr. Macy said the Telescope wasn't originally designed as a weapon, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dr. Macy said the Telescope wasn't originally designed as a weapon, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: For someone like me who's always used the Zoom Lens, this actually feels way more stable!
root.m_Talk_DEU: For someone like me who's always used the Zoom Lens, this actually feels way more stable!
root.m_Talk_FRA: For someone like me who's always used the Zoom Lens, this actually feels way more stable!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This might really work...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This might really work...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This might really work...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, listen up...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, listen up...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, listen up...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At full power, this Telescope should be able to knock that Hollow God out of the sky!
root.m_Talk_DEU: At full power, this Telescope should be able to knock that Hollow God out of the sky!
root.m_Talk_FRA: At full power, this Telescope should be able to knock that Hollow God out of the sky!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Are you serious?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Are you serious?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Are you serious?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I won't be able to hold it down for long! Maybe three seconds... tops!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I won't be able to hold it down for long! Maybe three seconds... tops!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I won't be able to hold it down for long! Maybe three seconds... tops!

root.m_Talk_ENG: After that, I'll need time to swap out the overheated power source!
root.m_Talk_DEU: After that, I'll need time to swap out the overheated power source!
root.m_Talk_FRA: After that, I'll need time to swap out the overheated power source!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only three seconds...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only three seconds...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only three seconds...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kid, you're killing me here! Can't you pad it out to five?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kid, you're killing me here! Can't you pad it out to five?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kid, you're killing me here! Can't you pad it out to five?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, pal! What good's haggling gonna do?! Quit whining!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, pal! What good's haggling gonna do?! Quit whining!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, pal! What good's haggling gonna do?! Quit whining!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without the kid, we wouldn't even have a way to bring down that damn Category 6 C.O. in the first place!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without the kid, we wouldn't even have a way to bring down that damn Category 6 C.O. in the first place!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without the kid, we wouldn't even have a way to bring down that damn Category 6 C.O. in the first place!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I like you, maid girl. You've got fire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I like you, maid girl. You've got fire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I like you, maid girl. You've got fire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, I'm not a maid!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, I'm not a maid!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, I'm not a maid!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Crashing the body of a Hollow God to earth and halting its rampage is important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Crashing the body of a Hollow God to earth and halting its rampage is important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Crashing the body of a Hollow God to earth and halting its rampage is important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But a Hollow God is an immortal being. Offering peace to that hideous being is an even greater duty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But a Hollow God is an immortal being. Offering peace to that hideous being is an even greater duty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But a Hollow God is an immortal being. Offering peace to that hideous being is an even greater duty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that duty falls only to you, who wields the Godslayer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that duty falls only to you, who wields the Godslayer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that duty falls only to you, who wields the Godslayer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When F959licette makes the Hollow God fall, everyone else should hold it down...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When F959licette makes the Hollow God fall, everyone else should hold it down...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When F959licette makes the Hollow God fall, everyone else should hold it down...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I should go in for the kill by destroying the heart, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I should go in for the kill by destroying the heart, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I should go in for the kill by destroying the heart, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's do this...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's do this...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's do this...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We might not get another shot at this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We might not get another shot at this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We might not get another shot at this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, the time is just right. We only get one chance...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, the time is just right. We only get one chance...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, the time is just right. We only get one chance...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Vector conversion at max! Gravity gun ready...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Vector conversion at max! Gravity gun ready...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Vector conversion at max! Gravity gun ready...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Firing...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Firing...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Firing...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really dropped it?! That's some insane firepower...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really dropped it?! That's some insane firepower...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really dropped it?! That's some insane firepower...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no greater sin on the battlefield than letting your guard down, and chances like this never come twice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no greater sin on the battlefield than letting your guard down, and chances like this never come twice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no greater sin on the battlefield than letting your guard down, and chances like this never come twice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Destroy the Hollow God's body while it's down!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Destroy the Hollow God's body while it's down!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Destroy the Hollow God's body while it's down!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I know already...! Black armor...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I know already...! Black armor...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I know already...! Black armor...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pin down the right wing. You blow off the other side...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pin down the right wing. You blow off the other side...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pin down the right wing. You blow off the other side...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Its legs and wings are down. Now's our chance!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Its legs and wings are down. Now's our chance!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Its legs and wings are down. Now's our chance!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go, Yoo Mina...!! We've got your back from here...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go, Yoo Mina...!! We've got your back from here...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go, Yoo Mina...!! We've got your back from here...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must finish this before it regenerates again...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must finish this before it regenerates again...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must finish this before it regenerates again...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Laika!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Laika!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Laika!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And with this...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And with this...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And with this...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Wolvesbane - Legacy Mode activated.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Wolvesbane - Legacy Mode activated.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Wolvesbane - Legacy Mode activated.</color>

root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Tactical update - Valkyrie melee response focus blade.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unbelievable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Unbelievable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Unbelievable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe humans actually brought down a Deus Ex Machina...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe humans actually brought down a Deus Ex Machina...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe humans actually brought down a Deus Ex Machina...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deus Ex Machina...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deus Ex Machina...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deus Ex Machina...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A Hollow God that meant to bring about the end of this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. A Hollow God that meant to bring about the end of this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. A Hollow God that meant to bring about the end of this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those outsiders may be far stronger than I expected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those outsiders may be far stronger than I expected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those outsiders may be far stronger than I expected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A god meant to end the world...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A god meant to end the world...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A god meant to end the world...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... now that the false god is defeated, is everything over...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... now that the false god is defeated, is everything over...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... now that the false god is defeated, is everything over...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'm afraid it's not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'm afraid it's not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'm afraid it's not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once a cup is broken, it can never be made whole again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once a cup is broken, it can never be made whole again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once a cup is broken, it can never be made whole again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Likewise, a world that has reached its breaking point won't just recover.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Likewise, a world that has reached its breaking point won't just recover.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Likewise, a world that has reached its breaking point won't just recover.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That woman, my future self, said we could turn the world back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That woman, my future self, said we could turn the world back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That woman, my future self, said we could turn the world back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, I don't know either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, I don't know either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, I don't know either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I thought you knew everything, but even you have limits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I thought you knew everything, but even you have limits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I thought you knew everything, but even you have limits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, of course I do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, of course I do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, of course I do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way I could know every truth about this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way I could know every truth about this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way I could know every truth about this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Abberline...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Abberline...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Abberline...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where are you going? That direction is...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where are you going? That direction is...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where are you going? That direction is...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, I need to fulfill the role given to me in the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, I need to fulfill the role given to me in the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, I need to fulfill the role given to me in the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solving mysteries is my job, after all.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Solving mysteries is my job, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff...!*

root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... Manipulating the Qliphoth Factor without Droma really takes a toll.

root.m_Talk_DEU: I probably have about four or five memory pulls left in me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I probably have about four or five memory pulls left in me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was amazing...! You really took down a Category 6 C.O...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was amazing...! You really took down a Category 6 C.O...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was amazing...! You really took down a Category 6 C.O...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. That was some top-notch support. You should be proud!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. That was some top-notch support. You should be proud!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. That was some top-notch support. You should be proud!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you two! Why are you acting like it's over?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you two! Why are you acting like it's over?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you two! Why are you acting like it's over?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stay sharp. There's no way it ends this easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stay sharp. There's no way it ends this easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stay sharp. There's no way it ends this easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive... Taking down a false god so easily...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive... Taking down a false god so easily...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive... Taking down a false god so easily...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've definitely grown, Wolf. Much more than last time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've definitely grown, Wolf. Much more than last time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've definitely grown, Wolf. Much more than last time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or perhaps it's just that you're fully recovered now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or perhaps it's just that you're fully recovered now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or perhaps it's just that you're fully recovered now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look at that! We took down the Hollow God...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look at that! We took down the Hollow God...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at that! We took down the Hollow God...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what else you've got planned, but none of it matters anymore...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what else you've got planned, but none of it matters anymore...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what else you've got planned, but none of it matters anymore...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So just give up and hand over Noelle...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So just give up and hand over Noelle...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So just give up and hand over Noelle...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that name...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that name...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that name...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on, Mina!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on, Mina!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on, Mina!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying that girl next to Swan is Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying that girl next to Swan is Noelle...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying that girl next to Swan is Noelle...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure it's really her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure it's really her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure it's really her?

root.m_Talk_FRA: What? What are you suddenly saying...?

Isn't it obvious that she's

root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Mina...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Mina...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Mina...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're experiencing the aftereffects of <color=#ffd34c>information erasure</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're experiencing the aftereffects of <color=#ffd34c>information erasure</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're experiencing the aftereffects of <color=#ffd34c>information erasure</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F959licette! But it can't be...
root.m_Talk_DEU: F959licette! But it can't be...
root.m_Talk_FRA: F959licette! But it can't be...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? Sudden chain dimensional rifts...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? Sudden chain dimensional rifts...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? Sudden chain dimensional rifts...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We took down the Hollow God... So why...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We took down the Hollow God... So why...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We took down the Hollow God... So why...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously, Yoo Mina. Don't tell me you thought that was the end?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously, Yoo Mina. Don't tell me you thought that was the end?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously, Yoo Mina. Don't tell me you thought that was the end?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You do have a sharp nose like a real retriever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One of the defining traits of the Category 6 C.O. Hollow God is its ability to trigger chain dimensional rifts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One of the defining traits of the Category 6 C.O. Hollow God is its ability to trigger chain dimensional rifts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One of the defining traits of the Category 6 C.O. Hollow God is its ability to trigger chain dimensional rifts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't respond quickly enough, it'll start pulling in other Category 6 C.O.s drifting through the imaginary dimension.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't respond quickly enough, it'll start pulling in other Category 6 C.O.s drifting through the imaginary dimension.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't respond quickly enough, it'll start pulling in other Category 6 C.O.s drifting through the imaginary dimension.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait...! The Telescope's picking up the Divinity signals...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait...! The Telescope's picking up the Divinity signals...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait...! The Telescope's picking up the Divinity signals...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: One... two... three...?! Multiple readings...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: One... two... three...?! Multiple readings...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: One... two... three...?! Multiple readings...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way, all of these...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way, all of these...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way, all of these...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit, this isn't looking good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit, this isn't looking good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit, this isn't looking good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We nearly died just taking down one...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We nearly died just taking down one...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We nearly died just taking down one...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each Category 6 C.O. that's drawn in will summon another Category 6 C.O...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each Category 6 C.O. that's drawn in will summon another Category 6 C.O...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each Category 6 C.O. that's drawn in will summon another Category 6 C.O...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, the world collapses under the pressure of the Corruption rays emitted by them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, the world collapses under the pressure of the Corruption rays emitted by them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, the world collapses under the pressure of the Corruption rays emitted by them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ironically, this is both the world's final defense mechanism...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ironically, this is both the world's final defense mechanism...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ironically, this is both the world's final defense mechanism...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And at the same time, it's the very process by which most worlds meet their end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And at the same time, it's the very process by which most worlds meet their end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And at the same time, it's the very process by which most worlds meet their end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ours was no different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ours was no different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ours was no different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, everything according to the script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a scriptwriter, I must say this is quite the exciting moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a scriptwriter, I must say this is quite the exciting moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a scriptwriter, I must say this is quite the exciting moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see if you can overturn a script that already has its ending written.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see if you can overturn a script that already has its ending written.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see if you can overturn a script that already has its ending written.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...!
